schema.description: Response to the test a translation template with a sample input message request.

translatedPayload.description: A stringified JSON message (result from applying template to the sample input).

reducedBytes.description: The number of bytes that the device didn't have to send over the network by using the translation template.

energyUsageReduction.description: The energy saved on data transfer using provided template in percent.

schema.title: Test translation template response

schema.description: An API error response in case of an HTTP Bad Request.
schema.title: Bad Request

schema.description: An API error response in case of an HTTP Unauthorized Request.
schema.title: Unauthorized Request

schema.description: An API error response in case of an HTTP Forbidden Request.
schema.title: Forbidden Request

schema.description: An API error response in case of a Server Side Error.

errors.description: List of errors encountered while calling the API.

schema.title: Server Error
